description:
bl ready today loses parent context and has no status column (everything is open by definition, but the visual language should match bl list so the eye doesn't retrain).

New format:
  ● ○ open          bl-368a   Hierarchical sub-task IDs          ids
  ● ○ open          bl-e28f   Installer symlinks 'balls' to bd   install  ↑ bl-a3f8 (Auth epic)

The ↑ bl-xxxx (title) hint appears only when the task has a parent. Dim color.

Sort: priority asc, then created_at asc (today's behavior). Group optional — default flat since it's always 'open'.

--json unchanged.
title: bl ready redesign: status column + parent hint line
